message:
style: reformat assertions and test setup in distributed and combinator tests

Apply consistent multi-line formatting to long assertion statements and test
object initialization across combinator and distributed test modules:

- bulkhead.rs: wrap assert_eq! with message argument across multiple lines
  for readability of the pattern-match assertion on concurrent_count
- circuit_breaker.rs: split assert!(matches!(...)) onto separate lines to
  clarify the CircuitState::Open pattern and elapsed threshold check
- distributed/tests.rs: consolidate RegionBridge::new_local() call to single
  line; compact snapshot.tasks vector initialization from 9 lines to 5
- distributed_snapshot_apply.rs: reformat bridge.apply_snapshot() chain and
  multiple assertions to consistent multi-line style; standardize blank line
  spacing between test sections

No functional changes. Continues ongoing rustfmt style normalization pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
